verse_text: Therefore concerning the eating of things offered to idols, we know that an idol is nothing in the world, and that there is no other God but one.

links.context: Unfortunately, humanity is so addicted to sin that even these terrifying plagues do not cause the survivors to repent (see [[1CO.8:4]]). Paul ([[1CO.10:20]], [[1CO.10:21]]) and early fathers such as Justin Martyr and Irenaeus also connected idol worship with the worship of demons.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
